title: Amit Shah tears into Indira Gandhi, Congress: ‘Naxalism spread due to Leftist ideology…’
description: Replying to a debate in the Lok Sabha on efforts to free the country from Left-wing extremism, Amit Shah has said that Naxalism has almost been eradicated from Bastar district in Chhattisgarh. He attacked former PM Indira Gandhi for ‘embracing’ the ideology.
